channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Scottie Scheffler looking at a blank canvas as he goes for a 3rd straight Players Championship
item.description: PONTE VEDRA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — The Players Championship has four decades of history at TPC Sawgrass suggesting it doesn't favor a particular style of golf — power player or pea shooter, great short game or consummate iron player. And then Scottie Scheffler came along.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trey McKenney joins elite company as 13th Wolverine to win Michigan Mr. Basketball award
item.description: Michigan Wolverines signee Trey McKenney, a Flint native, has been named 2025 Michigan Mr. Basketball.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Tiger Woods undergoes Achilles surgery after sustaining injury while training at home
item.description: Tiger Woods will likely miss the rest of the 2025 golf season after announcing on social media he underwent surgery for a torn Achilles.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Big 12 commissioner believes NCAA Tournament expansion is due. He says 76 teams is the right number
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Big 12 commissioner Brett Yormark is in favor of expanding the men's NCAA Tournament to 76 teams, and he believes a decision could come in the next few months, opening the possibility of proposed changes being implemented as soon as next year.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Stanley Cup champion suspended 20 games for violating NHL’s performance-enhancing drug policy
item.description: Florida Panthers defenseman Aaron Ekblad was suspended 20 games this week after the NHL said he violated the league's performance-enhancing substance policy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Floyd Burnsed shares more details about sudden Acalanes resignation
item.description: Burnsed says disagreement with principal Eric Shawn over the role of now-coach Joel Isaac was impetus for resignation
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Vikings focus up front in free agency by reaching deals with DT Jonathan Allen, G Will Fries
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings continued an aggressive reconstruction of the interior lines on Tuesday by agreeing to terms on contracts with former Washington defensive tackle Jonathan Allen and former Indianapolis guard Will Fries, who followed center Ryan Kelly from the Colts to the Vik
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-Giants quarterback Daniel Jones to sign with Colts on 1-year deal: reports
item.description: Former New York Giants quarterback Daniel Jones and the Indianapolis Colts agreed to terms on a one-year deal, according to reports on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Najee Harris agrees to 1-year deal with Chargers: reports
item.description: Najee Harris and the Los Angeles Chargers have reportedly agreed to a one-year deal worth up to $9.5 million, as the ex-Pittsburgh Steeler finds a new home out west.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Josh Giddey scores season-high 29 points before injuring ankle and Bulls beat Pacers 121-103
item.description: Josh Giddey had a season-high 29 points along with 10 rebounds before leaving midway through the fourth quarter with a right ankle injury, and the Chicago Bulls won their third straight game, 121-103 over the Indiana Pacers on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jets and QB Justin Fields agree to a 2-year, $40 million deal, AP source says
item.description: Justin Fields was passed over by the New York Jets four years ago in the NFL draft. Now he's expected to be their No. 1 quarterback. Fields and the Jets agreed Monday to a two-year contract worth $40 million, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Paige Bueckers scores 24 points and UConn wins 23rd Big East crown with 70-50 victory over Creighton
item.description: UNCASVILLE, Conn. (AP) — Paige Bueckers scored 24 points and Azzi Fudd added 13 to help No. 3 UConn beat 22nd-ranked Creighton 70-50 to win the Big East championship Monday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Deals for QBs Darnold and Fields, pass rushers Williams and Sweat highlight start of NFL free agency
item.description: The NFL champion Philadelphia Eagles are losing two of their defensive disruptors who pressured Patrick Mahomes in the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Saunders earns first team All-Big 12 honors
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fresh off leading No. 17 BYU to its eighth straight win on Saturday, Richie Saunders was named the Big 12 Most Improved Player and claimed First Team All-Big honors. Egor Demin earned honorable mention all-conference and all-freshman accolades.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Eddie George relishes challenge in taking over at Bowling Green
item.description: BOWLING GREEN, Ohio (AP) — Eddie George was pondering the next steps in his burgeoning career as a college football coach while driving back from the NFL scouting combine. He got a sign in the most unlikely of places.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Report: Bears sign DE Dayo Odeyingbo to 3-year deal
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears have signed defensive end Dayo Odeyingbo to a three-year deal, according to NFL insider Ian Rapoport. The 25-year-old was a second-round pick by the Colts in 2021 and addresses a need the team had on the defensive line.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Seahawks agree to sign quarterback Sam Darnold to 3-year deal: reports
item.description: The Seahawks reportedly agreed to sign Sam Darnold to a three-year deal, replacing Geno Smith after Darnold led the Vikings to the playoffs last year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boys Rugby: Cathedral Catholic 28, La Costa Canyon 17
item.description:
The High School Boys Rugby Championship was held in Del Mar as the Cathedral Catholic Dons hosted the La Costa Canyon Mavericks.
It was the Dons who came out victorious, defeated La Costa Canyon by a score of 28-17, to win their 5th straight Rugby Championship.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Myles Garrett becomes highest-paid non-QB in NFL history
item.description: Garrett, the 2023 AP DPOY, had asked for a trade last month but the Browns were adamant about keeping the 29-year-old star in Cleveland.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Myles Garrett becomes the highest-paid non-quarterback in NFL history at $40 million per year
item.description: Myles Garrett is staying in Cleveland after the Browns gave him a record four-year contract extension that makes the four-time All-Pro edge rusher the highest-paid non-quarterback in NFL history.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Aggies dominate Air Force in regular season finale
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Mason Falslev scored 18 points on 8-of-10 shooting to lead the Utah State basketball team to a dominating 87-47 win over Air Force. The Aggies had lost two in a row for the first time all year, but gave their fans plenty to cheer about in their home finale.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kessler pulls down 25 rebounds in Jazz loss at Toronto
item.description: TORONTO (ABC4 Sports) - Walker Kessler set a career high with 25 rebounds, to go along with a team-high 18 points and a career-high eight blocks, but it wasn't enough to prevent another loss by the Utah Jazz, who fell at Toronto Friday night, 118-101.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
